summary: Comprehensive testing of BC PO Submission Log Tracking feature (iteration_77). All 19 backend API tests passed (1 skipped). All frontend UI tests passed. POST /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/submission-log creates entries with submission_id, vendor info, bc_payload_snapshot. GET returns entries in reverse chronological order. BC export auto-logs with status='exported'. PO Drafts list shows latest_submission_status per draft. Frontend shows Submission Log section in PO Draft detail drawer with log list and add-entry form.

issues: Pre-existing React hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' in table tbody - cosmetic, non-blocking (same as previous iterations)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/submission-log - returns list with po_draft_id, total, entries
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/submission-log - returns entries in reverse chronological order
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/submission-log - returns 404 for nonexistent draft
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/submission-log - accepts valid statuses (submitted, acknowledged, failed)
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/submission-log - creates entry with all required fields (submission_id, vendor_id, vendor_name, bc_payload_snapshot)
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/submission-log - rejects invalid status (422)
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/submission-log - rejects archived draft (422)
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/submission-log - rejects nonexistent draft (404)
Backend: bc_payload_snapshot matches BC export payload structure (poDraftId, vendor, documentDate, lines)
Backend: BC export (GET bc-export) auto-creates 'exported' submission log entry
Backend: BC export auto-log includes bc_payload_snapshot
Backend: PO Drafts list endpoint includes latest_submission_status per draft
Backend: latest_submission_status reflects most recent log entry
Backend REGRESSION: PO Drafts list endpoint works
Backend REGRESSION: PO Draft detail endpoint works
Backend REGRESSION: Vendor assignment endpoint works
Backend REGRESSION: BC export endpoint works
Backend REGRESSION: Create incoming supply endpoint works
Backend REGRESSION: Balances endpoint works
Frontend: Submission Log section visible in PO Draft detail drawer when vendor assigned
Frontend: Log entries display with status badge, timestamp, notes
Frontend: Add Log form visible with status select, notes input, Log button
Frontend: Adding a log entry refreshes the log list
Frontend: BC export triggers auto-log visible in submission log section
Frontend: PO Drafts list shows latest_submission_status badge per draft
critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 1155-1237: POST /po-drafts/{id}/submission-log correctly validates status, draft existence, vendor assignment, and creates log entry with bc_payload_snapshot
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 1240-1254: GET /po-drafts/{id}/submission-log returns entries sorted by submitted_at descending (newest first)
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 1130-1146: BC export (bc-export endpoint) auto-creates submission log with status='exported' and bc_payload_snapshot
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 980-994: PO Drafts list enriched with latest_submission_status via aggregation pipeline on po_submission_logs
Frontend PODraftDetailDrawer (lines 1264-1393) correctly manages submissionLogs state, loadSubmissionLogs, and addSubmissionLog functions
Frontend Submission Log section (lines 1577-1624) shows add-log form (only for non-archived drafts) and log entries list
Frontend PODraftsPanel (line 1229) displays latest_submission_status badge per draft with appropriate styling

success_rate.backend: 100% (19/20 tests - 1 skipped due to no draft without vendor available)

seed_data_used: Used existing Hormel Foods workspace (customer_id: 366bfcce-4d68-4daf-b9f4-cb05a35de8c8). Draft PO-DRAFT-20260314163256-689B67 (has vendor V10045/Acme Bottle Supply, already had submission logs). Draft PO-DRAFT-20260314170144-8ED5A8 (has vendor UI-TEST-V001/UI Test Vendor Inc, used for frontend UI testing). Both drafts have incoming supply already created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PO Submission Log Tracking feature fully tested. New collection 'po_submission_logs' stores handoff events. Endpoints: (1) POST /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/submission-log - creates entries with status (submitted/acknowledged/failed), notes, vendor info, bc_payload_snapshot. (2) GET /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/submission-log - returns entries reverse-chronologically. BC export auto-creates 'exported' log entry. PO Drafts list enriched with latest_submission_status/latest_submission_at via MongoDB aggregation. Frontend shows Submission Log section in drawer with add-entry form (status select, notes input, Log button) and log list (status badge, timestamp, notes).

errors.422_invalid_status: Invalid status. Use: exported, submitted, acknowledged, failed
errors.422_archived: Cannot log submission for an archived draft
errors.422_no_vendor: Vendor information is required. Assign a vendor first.

bc_export_auto_log.auto_creates: submission log entry with status='exported', notes='Auto-logged on BC payload export'
